perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand in a bright indoor studio hallway in front of a photo booth; one wears a grey layered dress and headband, the other wears a striped vest, black top, and beret. They are smiling and gesturing towards each other. (2) They begin to unbutton and peel off their outer layers of clothing right in the hallway, revealing black tank tops and shorts underneath. One woman turns her back to the camera, struggling with a knot, while the other helps her. (3) They successfully remove the outer garments, gather the clothes in their arms, and prepare to move into the photo booth area while laughing.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts with high-pitched female voices speaking in Mandarin with an excited and humorous tone. (2) The sounds of fabric rustling and muffled laughter are interspersed with the continuous background music as the speakers interact. (3) The vocal volume remains high and energetic throughout the clip, ending with a final enthusiastic exclamation as the music continues.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '想換衣服沒有更衣間時' (Hook text: When you want to change clothes but there's no fitting room - humorous/relatable tone). (2) '(拍完一套準備拍下一套)' (Functional text: Finished one set, preparing for the next). (3) '所以等一下下去' (Functional text: So going down in a bit). (4) '等一下我們去洗衣服了 (拍洗衣服的拍貼)' (Functional text: We're going to wash clothes later (Taking photos with a 'washing clothes' theme)). (5) '對！我們等一下要去洗衣服' (Functional text: Right! We're going to wash clothes later). (6) '欸～這個～怎麼脫不掉？' (Functional text: Hey~ this~ why can't I take it off? - frustrated tone). (7) '好了好了' (Functional text: Okay, okay). (8) '不是～你這後面有一個蝴蝶結啦！' (Functional text: No~ there's a bow behind you!). (9) '換裝完畢！' (Hook text: Change complete! - triumphant tone). (10) '走！' (Functional text: Go!).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators visible throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women with long dark hair; one wears a grey mini skirt set and a thin headband, the other wears a black beret, a striped vest over a blue tank, and black shorts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern photo booth interior with an 'ELEVATOR' sign on a wooden door, various 'OBJET' brand posters on the walls, and a light yellow partition wall.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: Entertainment and lifestyle sharing. The video depicts a relatable and slightly chaotic 'behind-the-scenes' moment where two friends change their outfits in public to prepare for a photo session, emphasizing friendship and efficiency.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is filmed within an 'OBJET' branded photo studio, serving as a lifestyle promotion for the venue.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing with colorful Chinese captions and 'bestie' interactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets young social media users interested in trendy photo spots and 'outfit of the day' content.
